name: CheckWise PDF metadata dry run - Claude OCR AI Sheets

parameters.content:
## 1. Upload intake
PDF + document type + user context. This is the only human input at the start.

## 2. CheckWise backend
Calls your local backend through this public tunnel: https://kitty-produces-dow-sense.trycloudflare.com

## 3. Safety gate
Legal approval stays false. Human review stays required. AI and Sheets do not run in the backend.

## 4. Claude AI suggestions
Create an Anthropic API key in Anthropic Console. In this workflow, paste it into the HTTP Request header or replace the placeholder with an n8n credential/expression. Claude only suggests metadata; human review stays required.

## 5. Google Sheets audit row
Google Sheets now runs after Claude parsing so the audit row can include AI suggestion fields plus OCR/backend metadata.

parameters.formDescription: Upload one PDF and choose the expected document type. The backend will use the real CheckWise metadata rulebook, run local OCR, and return a human-review payload.

values.formSubmittedText: CheckWise metadata dry run completed. Return to n8n to inspect the review payload, OCR result, AI suggestion, and Sheets append.

nodes.name: POST PDF to CheckWise backend with OCR

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.CHECKWISE_ANTHROPIC_MODEL || 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 1200, temperature: 0, system: $json.claude_request.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.claude_request.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Parse Claude suggestions for human review

Parse Claude suggestions for human review
